description_long: This object is a stylized, blocky potted plant with a cubic, voxel-like design. The foliage is composed of green and pink cubes, suggesting a flowering plant or a shrub in bloom. The plant sits in a small, dark brown pot, which is also rendered in a cubic style. The green cubes dominate the upper and outer portions, while the pink cubes are interspersed throughout, mimicking blossoms or flowers. The trunk or stem is short and brown, supporting the dense, geometric canopy above. The overall appearance is playful and abstract, reminiscent of digital or pixel art.
description: A blocky, voxel-style potted plant with green and pink cubic foliage in a small brown pot. The design is abstract and colorful, evoking a flowering shrub.
description_view_0: Front view shows a dense arrangement of green and pink cubes, with the brown pot and trunk visible at the bottom center.
description_view_1: This view highlights more of the green foliage, with pink cubes less prominent and the pot partially obscured.
description_view_2: Side view reveals a more compact profile, with green cubes dominating and only a few pink cubes visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing a similar distribution of green and pink cubes, with the pot and trunk slightly more visible.
